reason_for_decision: The revised article now explains SAR principles, imaging modes, and application boundaries with enough depth and structure to exceed the pass threshold.
strengths: The article now explains why SAR is different from conventional surveillance radar instead of only praising all-weather imaging.
The imaging-mode section provides useful trade-off logic rather than a loose glossary treatment.
The distinction between strategic observation and local site-security sensing is now clear and operationally useful.
summary_assessment: This version is strong enough to pass. It provides a credible technical overview of SAR and keeps the article focused on what civil and security readers actually need to understand.
